case_title: SUHEY GIOVANNA AGUILAR VS. HERBERT JOHN DERUNGS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUHEY GIOVANNA AGUILAR. DEFENDANT HERBERT JOHN DERUNGS DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,600.00 FILED BY AGUILAR, SUHEY GIOVANNA AS TO DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, SUHEY GIOVANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN $5,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SEVICE $50.00 SERVED JAN-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $213.32 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF AGUILAR, SUHEY GIOVANNA AS TO DEFENDANT DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN
